properties.text:
Connect model and CLIP from a checkpoint loader, then click ➕ Add LoRA to add rows.

Without model/clip: the node only builds a LORA_STACK — feed the stack output to a downstream loader that has model/clip connected. This lets you define LoRAs once and apply them to several models.

widgets_values:
Connect model and CLIP from a checkpoint loader, then click ➕ Add LoRA to add rows.

Without model/clip: the node only builds a LORA_STACK — feed the stack output to a downstream loader that has model/clip connected. This lets you define LoRAs once and apply them to several models.
